final_prompt.prompt:
Create a product shot of a smartwatch placed on a marble surface, styled in a minimal business aesthetic.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, clean editorial style with restrained composition
Composition: three-quarter overhead angle, 50mm prime lens, shallow depth of field with watch as primary focal point
Subject: smartwatch with polished casing and visible screen detail, resting flat on white/grey marble surface; a ceramic coffee cup and a closed notebook positioned alongside as supporting props
Scene/backdrop: minimal indoor tabletop setting, neutral background, no clutter
Lighting/mood: soft natural side light from a window, gentle diffused shadows, calm and refined business mood
Color palette: cool marble white and grey as base, warm coffee-brown as secondary accent, metallic silver of watch as hero tone
Materials/textures: marble veining on surface, matte leather or fabric notebook cover, ceramic cup glaze, brushed metal watch case
Avoid: artificial studio flash look, busy backgrounds, lens flare, watermark, over-saturated colors, cluttered props
